name: io.github.hanmahong5-arch/wireforge
description: ISO 8583, SWIFT MT/MX, and SM-crypto toolkit for financial message parsing, validation, and translation. Read-only MCP server exposing 13 tools: wf_parse_iso8583, wf_build_iso8583, wf_validate_iso8583, wf_field_lookup, wf_decode_mti, wf_explain_message, wf_roundtrip_check, wf_parse_swift_mt, wf_ebcdic_decode, wf_sm3, wf_mt_mx_truncation_diff, wf_mx_address_compliance, wf_mx_address_scan.
long_description: Wireforge is a read-only financial-protocol analysis server. It parses and validates ISO 8583 payment messages, decodes EBCDIC-encoded data, computes SM3 cryptographic digests (GM/T 0004), performs SWIFT MT↔MX truncation-diff analysis, and checks (single-message or batch) pacs.008.001.08 / pacs.004.001.09 / pacs.003.001.08 / pain.001.001.09 SR2026 structured-address compliance — all without network access or side effects. Designed for payment developers, integration testers, and compliance engineers.

tools.name: wf_parse_iso8583
tools.description: Parse a raw ISO 8583 hex/binary message into structured fields.

tools.name: wf_build_iso8583
tools.description: Build an ISO 8583 message from a structured field map.

tools.name: wf_validate_iso8583
tools.description: Validate an ISO 8583 message against a field specification.

tools.name: wf_field_lookup
tools.description: Look up ISO 8583 field definitions by field number or name.

tools.name: wf_decode_mti
tools.description: Decode an ISO 8583 Message Type Indicator (MTI) into human-readable components.

tools.name: wf_explain_message
tools.description: Produce a plain-language explanation of a parsed ISO 8583 or SWIFT message.

tools.name: wf_roundtrip_check
tools.description: Parse then re-encode a message and report any field-level discrepancies.

tools.name: wf_parse_swift_mt
tools.description: Parse a SWIFT MT message into tagged fields and validate structure.

tools.name: wf_ebcdic_decode
tools.description: Decode EBCDIC-encoded bytes to UTF-8 text.

tools.name: wf_sm3
tools.description: Compute an SM3 (GM/T 0004) cryptographic digest of the provided input.

tools.name: wf_mt_mx_truncation_diff
tools.description: Diff a SWIFT MT message against its MX (ISO 20022) equivalent and identify truncated or unmapped fields.

tools.name: wf_mx_address_compliance
tools.description: Structural CBPR+ SR2026 presence check: verifies a pacs.008.001.08, pacs.004.001.09, pacs.003.001.08 or pain.001.001.09 debtor/creditor postal address carries Town Name (TwnNm) and Country (Ctry) in dedicated structured fields (mandatory 2026-11-14). Auto-detects the message type. A DETECTOR, not a full CBPR+ validation and not a certification.

tools.name: wf_mx_address_scan
tools.description: Batch variant of wf_mx_address_compliance: runs the same SR2026 structured-address presence check over one-or-more MX envelopes and returns a diff-style gate summarizing the whole batch. A DETECTOR, not a full CBPR+ validation and not a certification.
